## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- "Closes #N" or "Refs #N". odf-kit requires prior discussion on an issue
     before code is written, per CONTRIBUTING.md. PRs without a linked issue
     may be asked to open one first. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking, additive change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Internal / refactor / tooling (no user-facing change)
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (and new tests cover the change)
- [ ] `npm run validate-html` passes (if applicable)
- [ ] Public API change is additive only (no renames, signature changes, or removals without prior agreement)
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing behaviour changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything the reviewer should know: design alternatives considered,
     trade-offs, areas that would benefit from extra scrutiny, etc. -->
